content: Actions API  Table of contents Actions API enables you to perform specific actions such a requesting report collection. Report collection You can trigger a delta report collection in order to have fresh host data. URI: https://hub.cfengine.com/api/actions/report_collection Method: POST Parameters: hostkey (string) Unique host identifier Example request (curl): code curl -k --user <username>:<password> \ -X POST \ https://hub.cfengine.com/api/actions/report_collection \ -H 'content-type: application/json' \ -d '{"hostkey": "SHA=f329165d27a4484c626eb888e0ce3b1c6da6317177851fc999c2b1b1c159b4e8"}' Example response: code HTTP 202 Accepted Trigger agent run You can trigger an agent run for an individual host. URI: https://hub.cfengine.com/api/actions/agent_run Method: POST Parameters: hostkey (string) Unique host identifier Example request (curl): code curl -k --user <username>:<password> \ -X POST \ https://hub.cfengine.com/api/actions/agent_run \ -H 'content-type: application/json' \ -d '{"hostkey": "SHA=f329165d27a4484c626eb888e0ce3b1c6da6317177851fc999c2b1b1c159b4e8"}' Example response: code HTTP 202 Accepted { "output": " notice: Waiting for child processes to finish\n172.28.128.15> cf-serverd executing cfruncommand: /bin/sh -c ' \"/var/cfengine/bin/cf-agent\" -I -D cf_runagent_initiated -f /var/cfengine/inputs/update.cf ; \"/var/cfengine/bin/cf-agent\" -I -D cf_runagent_initiated\n", "exit_code": 0 }
title: Actions API
headers: Actions API  Report collection   Trigger agent run
